---
title: "Úvod do Djanga"
---

Podklady pro výuku (videa, kódy, transkript, prezentace): 

- <a href="https://cs50.harvard.edu/web/weeks/3/" target="_blank">https://cs50.harvard.edu/web/weeks/3/</a>

YouTube lekce: 

- <a href="https://youtu.be/w8q0C-C1js4?si=VeyTaNxZ3ajo1HWg" target="_blank">https://youtu.be/w8q0C-C1js4?si=VeyTaNxZ3ajo1HWg</a>

Zdrojové soubory: 

- <a href="https://cdn.cs50.net/web/2020/spring/lectures/3/src3.zip" target="_blank">https://cdn.cs50.net/web/2020/spring/lectures/3/src3.zip</a>

Mohou se hodit moje poznámky ke gitu

- <a href="../web_html/02git.qmd" target="_blank">Git</a>
